rootMargin: '0px 0px -40px 0px' });\n            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {\n              document.querySelectorAll('.prg-reveal,.reveal-left,.reveal-scale').forEach(el => obs.observe(el));\n            });\n            const mo = new MutationObserver(() => {\n
